name: app-sidebar
title: App Sidebar
description: The prototype's app-shell navigation sidebar: brand header, global ⌘K search trigger, Synclair / System / Library nav groups with active states, external reference links, snapshot footer.

files.content:
"use client" import Link from "next/link" import { usePathname } from "next/navigation" import { Blocks, BookOpen, Bot, Component, FileClock, GitCommitHorizontal, Library, LayoutTemplate, Palette, PanelsTopLeft, Search, Server, } from "lucide-react" import { OPEN_COMMAND_EVENT } from "@/components/blocks/command-palette" import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge" import { synclair } from "@/lib/system/routes" import { project } from "@/lib/system/seed/project" import { Sidebar, SidebarContent, SidebarFooter, SidebarGroup, SidebarGroupContent, SidebarGroupLabel, SidebarHeader, SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarMenuItem, SidebarRail, } from "@/components/ui/sidebar" type NavItem = { title: string icon: React.ComponentType<{ className?: string }> href: string soon?: boolean } const navGroups: { label: string; items: NavItem[] }[] = [ { label: "Synclair", items: [{ title: "Overview", icon: PanelsTopLeft, href: synclair() }], }, { label: "Project", items: [ { title: "Knowledge", icon: Library, href: synclair("/knowledge") }, { title: "Figma Manifest", icon: FileClock, href: synclair("/figma-manifest") }, { title: "References", icon: BookOpen, href: synclair("/references") }, { title: "GitHub", icon: GitCommitHorizontal, href: synclair("/github") }, ], }, { label: "Library", items: [ { title: "Foundations", icon: Palette, href: synclair("/foundations") }, { title: "Components", icon: Component, href: synclair("/components") }, { title: "Blocks", icon: Blocks, href: synclair("/blocks") }, { title: "Templates", icon: LayoutTemplate, href: synclair("/templates") }, ], }, { label: "System", items: [ { title: "AI Setup", icon: Bot, href: synclair("/ai-setup") }, { title: "Environment", icon: Server, href: synclair("/environment") }, ], }, ] export function AppSidebar({ snapshot }: { snapshot?: string }) { const pathname = usePathname() return ( {project.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()} {project.name} / Synclair window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent(OPEN_COMMAND_EVENT))} className="text-muted-foreground" > Search ⌘K {navGroups.map((group) => ( {group.label} {group.items.map((item) => ( {item.title} {item.soon && ( soon )} ))} ))} {snapshot &&

{snapshot}

} ) }
